---
title: "Computer Science Scripts"
subtitle: "Teaching Materials & References"
toc: false
---

Welcome to the CS Scripts collection. Select a topic below to access the corresponding materials.

## Topics

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Programming](programming/index.qmd)
Fundamentals of programming — variables, control flow, functions, data structures, OOP, and more.
:::

::: {.g-col-6}
### [Networking](networking/index.qmd)
Computer networking — OSI model, protocols, IP addressing, routing, and more.
:::

:::

---

*More topics will be added over time.*
